consumableChaomaniaDescription: Enhances 4 tiles into random floor types.
consumableLogomaniaDescription: Creates up to 2 random Mania consumables.
consumableMorphomaniaDescription: Creates up to 2 random item upgrade consumables. They go into your bag so you can use or sell them later.
consumableEchomaniaDescription: Adds a copy of the last Mania or item upgrade consumable you used (as a consumable in your bag). Does not copy Echomania itself.
consumableKybomaniaDescription: Grants money equal to equipped boon sell values (max <money>$50</money>).
consumableVibemaniaDescription: Grants 2 random Vibes (Common, Uncommon, or Rare) if you have empty Vibe slots.
consumableKratomaniaDescription: Upgrades every gem color by one level.
consumableGenomaniaDescription: Duplicates a random equipped Vibe if you have an empty Vibe slot.
consumablePhobomaniaDescription: Replaces every equipped Vibe with a random new one (any tier).
consumableHeteromaniaDescription: Grants a random Uncommon Vibe if you have an empty Vibe slot.
consumableOligomaniaDescription: Grants a random Rare Vibe if you have an empty Vibe slot.
consumableHyperomaniaDescription: Grants a random Legendary Vibe if you have an empty Vibe slot.
consumableCyclomaniaDescription: Grants <money>$2</money> for each unused <shuffle>shuffle</shuffle> banked this run.
consumableAnagennomaniaDescription: Rerolls the next boss fight to another eligible boss for that cycle.
consumableBeltiomaniaDescription: Grants a random run upgrade. Does nothing if none are left.
consumableTachymaniaDescription: Grants <money>$3</money> for each round skipped this run.
consumableCookiemaniaDescription: Adds <move>+3 Moves</move> this round, or to the next round if used outside a match.
